author: y4rr
content: Block-paging Pareto frontier characterized on Llama 3 8B + ShadowLlm. SHIPPED: 57% MLP weight-bandwidth savings (pw=3, h=1024, train threshold=0.5, inference threshold=-2.5) while preserving dense top-1 token, cos_sim 0.882. Tested: pos_weight ∈ {1, 3, 5}, h_dim ∈ {1024, 2048}, train threshold ∈ {0.1, 0.2, 0.5}, inference threshold ∈ [-10, 0]. Implemented asymmetric BCE, UNION(Shadow, SVD), pin_hot_blocks budget reserve. 1.5M-trace data ceiling: cos_sim>0.99 only at >97% density. To break through: more data, multi-tap input, magnitude-weighted loss, top-K ranking head. Full Pareto in results/PARETO_SUMMARY.md. 85 lib tests pass.
